title: splitFee parts don't sum back to the total
problemStatement: splitFee(totalCents, n) should split an integer amount of cents into `n` parts as evenly as possible, returning an array of `n` non-negative integers that SUM EXACTLY to totalCents. The remainder cents (when totalCents is not divisible by n) must be distributed one each to the earliest parts, so parts are within 1 cent of each other and earlier parts are >= later parts. It currently drops the remainder, so the parts under-sum the total. Fix src/splitFee.ts so that splitFee.test.ts passes. Do NOT modify any test file.
